samples_with_last_updated.hint: UTC time in seconds, counted from January 1, 1970.
UTC time in seconds, counted from January 1, 1970.

top_findings: API usage-doc coverage is low: 3.28% (216 API pages detected)
Freshness visibility is weak: only 37.95% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.deno.com covered 614 pages across multi-project topology with 91.5% overall confidence. Critical issues include 15 confirmed broken internal documentation links and severely low API reference coverage at 3.28% despite 216 API pages detected. SEO/geo metadata issues affect 15.55% of pages, while only 37.95% of pages display last-updated timestamps. Example code reliability estimates at 91.56% are acceptable but not optimal.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100.16% of discovered pages (614/613 in scope)
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95%)
Example code reliability estimate of 91.56% indicates generally functional samples
Zero trap URLs or crawl anomalies detected
risks: 15 confirmed broken internal documentation links create poor user experience and erode trust
API reference coverage at 3.28% is critically insufficient for developer onboarding (216 API pages with minimal usage documentation)
SEO/geo issue rate of 15.55% (approximately 95 pages) impacts discoverability and search ranking
Only 37.95% freshness coverage leaves 62% of pages without visible last-updated dates, undermining content trust
8.44% example code failure risk (100% - 91.56%) may cause developer friction during implementation
Large excluded links count (2,905) suggests potential over-filtering or external dependency risks not fully assessed
Multi-project topology increases maintenance complexity and cross-reference fragility

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 15 confirmed broken internal documentation links immediately
Expand API reference coverage from 3.28% to minimum 60% by adding usage examples, parameters, and integration guides to 216 detected API pages
Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages to increase freshness coverage from 37.95% to 95%+
Audit and remediate SEO/geo metadata issues affecting 15.55% of pages (titles, descriptions, structured data)
Test and fix the 8.44% failing example code to achieve 98%+ reliability

limitations: External audit cannot verify runtime correctness of code examples beyond static analysis; 91.56% reliability is an estimate
API coverage detection relies on heuristics; actual developer-perceived coverage may differ from 3.28% metric
Broken link detection limited to crawled pages; dynamic content, authenticated sections, or JavaScript-rendered links may be missed
SEO/geo issue severity and business impact require manual review; automated detection flags potential problems only
Freshness analysis based on visible timestamps only; actual content currency cannot be determined from metadata alone
